g.text: Use when there is no usable classification.
The system creates a ZATCA-ready HS code
and compliant description from product data.
New SKUs with only a name or short description
Sparse catalog data from suppliers or marketplaces
First-time classification for a client or product line
Use when a code already exists but could
be more accurate. The system suggests a
Legacy catalogs needing refinement at scale
Reclassification after ruling or regulation changes
Use when the code must be checked before
HS code, description, and declared value
Audit trail of why a classification was accepted
Each mode builds on the previous — from creation to intelligence to compliance
